name: sdd-workflow
description: Project-local SDD workflow plugin for agent-only phase implementation, review-note fixes, gates, and contract sync.

interface.shortDescription: Agent-only phase workflow, gates, and contract sync
interface.longDescription: Workspace-local Codex plugin that exposes the project's SDD workflow as native Codex skills and slash commands, while also declaring project-local docs MCP expectations.
defaultPrompt: Draft SPEC.md from a high-level project brief
Initialize the next project phase from SPEC.md
Implement scoped phase tasks through the agent execution loop
Run the phase gate checks for the current phase
Sync CONTEXT.md and STATE.md after a phase completes
